The '''''Tegret''''' was a [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. The [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]] was to escort a convoy of 3 [[Modular conveyor|Modular Conveyor]] across the [[Atterol system/Legends|Atterol system]]. However the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] sent a strike force to steal at least one of the convoy craft.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter]]'' {{1st}}
